titleEn: Long-Life All-Vanadium Redox Flow Batteries Integrating Doped TiO₂ Nanowire Electrodes and Heterogeneous Laminated COF Separator Membranes
titleZh: 結合摻雜型二氧化鈦奈米線電極與異質疊層共價有機框架隔離膜之長效全釩液流電池開發
agencyEn: National Science and Technology Council, Taiwan
agencyZh: 國家科學及技術委員會
scopeEn: Integration of doped TiO₂ nanowire electrode engineering, graphite-felt modification, and heterogeneous laminated covalent-organic-framework membranes to improve redox kinetics, energy efficiency, ion selectivity, and cycling durability.
scopeZh: 結合摻雜型 TiO₂ 奈米線電極、石墨氈改質與異質疊層 COF 隔離膜，以提升釩離子氧化還原動力學、能量效率、離子選擇性與循環壽命。

titleEn: Industry–Academia Development of a Smart Vacuum-Flash System and Film-Formation Parameter Control Technology for Perovskite Module Processing
titleZh: 產學協作開發用於鈣鈦礦模組製程之智慧真空閃蒸裝置與成膜參數調控技術
agencyEn: National Science and Technology Council, Taiwan
agencyZh: 國家科學及技術委員會
scopeEn: Development of a modular, programmable vacuum-flash platform for scalable perovskite-module coating, pressure-profile control, in-line monitoring, and data-driven process optimization.
scopeZh: 開發可模組化與程式化控制的真空閃蒸平台，應用於鈣鈦礦模組之可放大塗佈、壓力曲線控制、線上監測與數據驅動製程最佳化。

titleEn: Innovative Prototype Project: Miniature Add-On Device for State-of-Charge Monitoring of All-Vanadium Redox Flow Batteries Using Real-Time Spectral Analysis
titleZh: 創新型原型計畫：即時光譜分析應用於全釩液流電池電量監測之微型外掛裝置
scopeEn: Development of a compact external optical-spectroscopy module for rapid, non-invasive monitoring of electrolyte state of charge in all-vanadium redox flow batteries.
scopeZh: 開發可外掛於全釩液流電池系統的微型即時光譜量測模組，以非侵入方式快速監測電解液荷電狀態。

titleEn: Innovative Prototype Project: Rapid Testing Module for Flow-Battery Materials and Systems
titleZh: 創新型原型計畫：液流電池材料與系統快速測試模組開發
scopeEn: Development of a modular platform for rapid screening of flow-battery electrodes, membranes, electrolytes, cells, and operating conditions.
scopeZh: 建立模組化快速測試平台，用於篩選液流電池電極、隔離膜、電解液、電池單元與操作條件。
